title: salix × doniana
intro: Salix × doniana, also known as the Guelder Rose or Wolf's Claw, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Salix viminalis and Salix purpurea, both native to Europe. This deciduous shrub or small tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Salix × doniana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant's bark and leaves can be used to make herbal preparations like tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
